title: Remove tarball as an option from buildah push --help
body:
pushing to the tarball transport is not supported, so removing
the option from the inline help

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM.  The man page for push looks fine to me, but if you could just double check @umohnani8 if you haven't already, I'd appreciate it.
@TomSweeneyRedHat double checked the man page and it looks good :)

:pushpin: Commit fd529af has been approved by `rhatdan`
